display_text: Whisper of the Dread, Tier 3: Neutral item equipped to the hero. Passive: Tunnel Vision - reduces the equipped hero's daytime vision by 15% but increases their Spell Damage by 10%. A trade-off for spellcasters seeking damage output at the cost of awareness. Stats: Vision Penalty: -15%, Spell Damage: +10%.
